ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator assigned to the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., in service, maintenance) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., bus, train, subway) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift the operator is assigned to (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the operator */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the operator was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "vid" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the run */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator assigned to the run */,
  "reported_run_id" TEXT /* Reported run ID as recorded by the operator */,
  "assigned_run_id" TEXT /* Assigned run ID as planned by the MTA */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route the run is part of */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "actual_start_time" TEXT /* Actual start time of the run */,
  "actual_end_time" TEXT /* Actual end time of the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_vid FOREIGN KEY ("vid") REFERENCES vehicles ("vid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_assigned_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_run_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "run_id" TEXT /* ID of the run the location data is part of */,
  "vid" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "dsc" INTEGER /* Distance to the next stop (planned) */,
  "actual_dsc" INTEGER /* Actual distance to the next stop */,
  "actual_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the run (e.g., IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED) */,
  "actual_is_run_formal" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the run is formal */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_vid FOREIGN KEY ("vid") REFERENCES vehicles ("vid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the route */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., local, express) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* ID of the route the stop is part of */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "stop_type" TEXT /* Type of stop (e.g., bus stop, subway station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, supervisor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operator_shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who worked the shift */,
  "shift_date" TEXT /* Date of the shift */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_shifts_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "vid" TEXT /* ID of the vehicle that received maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vid FOREIGN KEY ("vid") REFERENCES vehicles ("vid")
)
